nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: Mayan antthrush
nodes.summary: Mayan antthrush（Mayan antthrush，学名 Formicarius moniliger），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于常綠森林、次生林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 常綠森林
nodes.summary: 常綠森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联442种鸟类，包括紫冠雉、角冠雉、Razor-billed curassow等442种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 次生林
nodes.summary: 次生林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联749种鸟类，包括孤䳍、Sickle-winged guan、黑額鳴冠雉等749种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The species primarily inhabits humid evergreen, semi-deciduous, and deciduous forest

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It also occurs in coffee plantations and mature secondary forest

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: No immediate threats have been identified. it is considered uncommon to fairly common. "Experimental evidence supports the hypothesis that the Mayan Antthrush is among those forest species less likely to move between patches than non-forest species at the same study site, and that pasture gaps of >50 m already prove significant barriers [which] suggests that habitat loss has a negative effect on the species"
